| `name` | Title of dataset |

## 🧩 Thematic Index

Grouped by research theme (inferred from folder names and file names):

| Theme | Datasets |
|-------|---------|
| Automation & Voting | Gingrich `RP_Context_Data`, ZA-series ISSP waves |
| Populism & Economic Vulnerability | Baccini `Analysis_Dataset_*`, `ESSdata`, `districtdata` |
| Class Mobility & Far-Right | Gugushvili ESS waves (ESS1–ESS5), `correspondence` crosswalk |
| Trade & Globalisation | Milner `oecd_*_trade`, `BFW_*`, `regional_gdp_by_year` |
| Occupational Structure | `isco08_3d-task3`, SIWE survey, `ELFS_regional_routine_shares` |
| ESS Micro-data (public) | ESS1–ESS9 CSVs and Stata files |
| Party Politics | `party_classifications`, `CLEA_voteshare_turnout`, `parlgov_*`, `MPDataset` |
| Left-Behind / Well-Being | Steiner `ZA7700`, Silva `graphsdata`, Euroscepticism replication |

---

## 🔑 Key Variable Glossary (Cross-Dataset)

| Variable (common name) | What it captures | Appears in |
|------------------------|-----------------|------------|
| `vote`, `vote_*` | Electoral choice / party vote | ESS, Baccini, Gingrich |
| `isco*`, `isco08` | ISCO occupation code | ESS waves, SIWE, ELFS |
| `rtask`, `routine_*` | Routine task intensity (automation exposure) | isco08_3d-task3, ELFS |
| `popuList_*`, `ches_*` | Party populism/extremism scores | Global Party Survey, MPDataset |
| `cntry`, `country` | Country identifier (ISO-2 or numeric) | ESS, Milner, Baccini |
| `nuts*`, `region` | NUTS regional identifier | Baccini district data, ARDECO |
| `hinctnta`, `income` | Household income | ESS micro-data |
| `uemp*`, `unempl*` | Unemployment variables | CPDS, macro datasets |
| `austerity_*` | Fiscal austerity measures | Baccini raw data |
| `subjclass`, `class_*` | Subjective/objective class position | Kurer, Gugushvili |

---

*End of Data Dictionary — regenerate at any time by running `map_data.py`.*
